title: Personalise Your Learning
subtitle: Answer a few quick questions so we can show information that is more relevant to you.
disclaimer: This information supports your learning and does not replace advice from your healthcare professional.
step1_q: How familiar are you with FH?
step1_opt1_title: I am completely new to FH
step1_opt1_desc: I have not heard much about it before.
step1_opt2_desc: I understand some of the basics.
step1_opt3_desc: I already understand the main ideas.
step1_opt4_title: I already know quite a bit
step1_opt4_desc: I would prefer more detailed information.
step2_q: What would you like to learn more about?
step2_opt_family_explain: Testing close family members after FH is found in one relative.
step2_opt_other_topics_desc: More FH topics are available whenever you are ready.
step3_q: What are you most concerned about right now?
step3_opt_none: I do not have a specific concern
